- Zone cohesion of 0.06 is driven entirely by test-to-source import edges — the 3 production files have no meaningful coupling to each other and form no coherent module; the zone is a community-detection artifact of test co-location, not a real architectural boundary
- The three production files (dag.ts, tree.ts, move.ts) have cohesion 0.06 meaning they share no imports with each other — they are three independent utilities with no shared abstraction, so merging them into prd-domain-operations adds 3 files to core without creating any new coherence; each should be evaluated for the specific zone it primarily serves rather than batch-merged

- RISK AREA: cohesion 0.06 + coupling 0.94 are both at critical levels — this zone is statistically indistinguishable from a random file grouping; it provides zero locality benefit and every consumer pays a cross-zone boundary cost for primitives that should be inlined into core
